title: Add Edges to Make Degrees of All Nodes Even
titleCn: 添加边使所有节点度数都为偶数

testcases.input: n = 5, edges = [[1,2],[2,3],[3,4],[4,2],[1,4],[2,5]] Output: true Explanation: The above diagram shows a valid way of adding an edge. Every node in the resulting graph is connected to an even number of edges.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The above diagram shows a valid way of adding an edge. Every node in the resulting graph is connected to an even number of edges.

testcases.input: n = 4, edges = [[1,2],[3,4]] Output: true Explanation: The above diagram shows a valid way of adding two edges.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The above diagram shows a valid way of adding two edges.

testcases.input: n = 4, edges = [[1,2],[1,3],[1,4]] Output: false Explanation: It is not possible to obtain a valid graph with adding at most 2 edges.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is not possible to obtain a valid graph with adding at most 2 edges.
